demo.section.title: Echoes of the Ancients
demo.section.intro: Walk in the footsteps of cultivators who conquered the heavens — each echo teaches one path of the dao.
demo.combat.tag: Unbound power — walk their path in combat
demo.skills.loadout_hint: Defaults are ready — tap a slot, then pick. Hold any skill button in combat to swap anytime.
demo.enter.note: This is a guided echo — your own journey is not lost.
demo.enter.confirm_note: Your current journey will be paused safely. Nothing is lost until you choose to return.
demo.ancient.breakthrough_sage.name: Gu Wei
demo.ancient.breakthrough_sage.lore: He stood at the threshold between mortal and immortal — spirit full, realm peak. Tap Cultivate on Home to live the breakthrough ceremony he earned.
demo.ancient.insight_seeker.name: Su Yan
demo.ancient.insight_seeker.lore: Her insight meter brimmed with understanding but the final spark had not yet come. Open Skills — awaken void and sword as she nearly did.
demo.ancient.void_walker.name: Mo Xu
demo.ancient.void_walker.lore: Once a mortal of a fallen village, he walked the void path to its end — Void Spirit realm, awakened fractures, a spirit fox at his side.
demo.ancient.sword_ancestor.name: Lin Feng
demo.ancient.sword_ancestor.lore: His blade fell like starlight across a hundred sects. Core Formation peak, sword and lightning awakened — master of combo and dodge.
demo.ancient.flame_sovereign.name: Yan Lei
demo.ancient.flame_sovereign.epithet: Flame Sovereign of the Nascent Soul
demo.ancient.flame_sovereign.lore: He burned through nine heavenly tribulations. Nascent Soul, twin flame and life mend awakened — feel late-game combat power.
demo.ancient.fortune_emissary.name: Luo Qian
demo.ancient.fortune_emissary.lore: Fortune favored her at every turn — six encounters found, lore collected, spirit fox bound. Browse Story and Inventory to see what the dao hides.
demo.lore.fallen_village.memory_01: The village bell still rings in the void — though no one remains to hear it.
demo.lore.fallen_village.memory_02: She promised to return when the dao tree bloomed. The tree is ash; the promise remains.
